name: sluice
description: Sluice: a small self-hostable report-triage platform — a Cloudflare Worker (D1 + R2) that receives in-app problem reports (with attachments) for pull-based triage, plus a Preact web UI for reviewing and promoting them to GitHub issues.

scripts.deploy:web: vite build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name sluice-ui --branch production
